scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && node ../scripts/copyClientDist.js
scripts.start: cd server && npm install && npm run start
scripts.clean: cd client && if exist node_modules rmdir /s /q node_modules && cd ../server && if exist node_modules rmdir /s /q node_modules
scripts.bundle: npm run build && if exist dist rmdir /s /q dist && mkdir dist && xcopy client dist\client /E /I /Y && xcopy server dist\server /E /I /Y
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run start
